question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor poses essentially no didactic questions — it dumps the full solution upfront and only suggests edge cases to consider. The user drove the verification, not the Tutor.

question_quality.rationale: The Tutor frames two retrospective 'key decisions' (what to store, when to update left), which do hit the crux, but these are stated as summary points rather than posed as choices for the student to grapple with.

scaffolding.rationale: The very first turn spoils the entire solution including the subtle guard condition with worked example. There's no progressive build-up; the student is left to verify rather than discover.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the back-and-forth is natural; the Tutor responds well to the student's traces and offers concrete edge cases. Flow is fluid albeit short.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
